targetRepo: Aircall Hydra monorepo (paths in `references` are relative to the Hydra repo root, not this skill)
abstract: Conventions for building components in Aircall's UI libraries — @aircall/ds (design system on Tailwind 4 + Base UI + CVA) and @aircall/blocks (higher-level compositions) — as they live in the Aircall Hydra monorepo. Captures the rules the TypeScript types can't express: compound-by-default architecture, CVA + cn + data-slot styling, Base UI render-prop polymorphism, flat-file layout with a single top-level barrel, and the spec-first build workflow.
